content:
Design Approval Organization 
Delegation of Authority 
 
Number:    DAO #99-X-01 
 
Subsequent to a finding that 
 
 
Company Name 
 
 
complies with the Airworthiness Manual Chapter 505 E, authorization is hereby 
made for the exercise of delegated authority in accordance with, and subject to the 
limitations in, their approved Design Approval Procedures Manual. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 _______________________________ 
 
David Turnbull, Director, National Aircraft Certification 
 for the Minister of Transport  
 
 
 
 July 1, 1999
 
 Date 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
This certificate is not transferable and is effective until surrendered to 
or suspended / cancelled by the Minister of Transport Canada
